prompt: Generate a screenshot of a tree traversal algorithm simulator interface. Use the visual style and layout of the tree (including nodes, edges, and their arrangement) from the first image, and incorporate the traversal options drop-down menu from the second image.
prompt_refined: Generate a screenshot of a tree traversal algorithm simulator interface. The interface should display a binary tree with the exact visual style, node/edge coloring (light blue nodes with white letters, light blue edges), and hierarchical layout observed in image 1, against a clean white background. Include the left and right navigation arrow buttons seen in image 1. Positioned clearly within the interface, such as in the top-right section, integrate the 'Select Traversal' drop-down menu from image 2, ensuring it retains its dark background and includes all the options listed: 'Postorder Traversal', 'Preorder Traversal', 'Inorder Traversal', and 'Levelorder Traversal'.
objects: Binary tree with light blue nodes, white letters, and light blue edges (Image 1 style)
Hierarchical layout of the binary tree (Image 1 style)
'Select Traversal' drop-down menu in the top-right section
Dark background for the 'Select Traversal' menu
Menu options: 'Postorder Traversal', 'Preorder Traversal', 'Inorder Traversal', 'Levelorder Traversal'
